things.name: Turku Castle
things.description: Finland's largest and oldest medieval castle dating to the 1280s at the mouth of the Aura river

things.name: Turku Cathedral
things.description: Medieval Lutheran cathedral, the mother church of Finland, dating to the 13th century

things.name: Aboa Vetus & Ars Nova
things.description: Unique museum where medieval ruins below meet modern art above

things.name: Turku Art Museum
things.description: Finland's oldest dedicated art museum with a landmark granite building on Puolalanmaki

things.name: Forum Marinum
things.description: Maritime museum on the Aura river with historic vessels including a full-rigged ship

things.name: Luostarinmaki Handicrafts Museum
things.description: Best-preserved 18th-century town block in Scandinavia with working craft workshops

things.name: Turku Market Square
things.description: Lively outdoor market with Finnish produce and the neoclassical market hall

things.name: Archipelago National Park
things.description: World's largest archipelago with 50,000 islands accessible by ferry from Turku

things.name: Old Great Square (Vanha Suurtori)
things.description: Restored medieval heart of Turku with the Brinkkala mansion and Pharmacy Museum

things.name: Ruissalo Island
things.description: Green island villa district with oak forests, botanical garden and sandy beaches
